text:
(1) A person commits the offense of violation of slow-moving vehicle emblem requirements if the person:

(a) Drives or moves on any highway or owns and causes or knowingly permits to be driven or moved on any highway a vehicle or combination of vehicles if the vehicle or combination of vehicles:

(A) Is required by ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) to be equipped with a slow-moving vehicle emblem and the vehicle is not equipped with an emblem in the manner required by ORS 815.060 (Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems) .

(B) Is displaying a slow-moving vehicle emblem when not required under ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) or in a manner not in conformity with ORS 815.060 (Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems) ; or

(b) Displays a slow-moving vehicle emblem on a highway when not required under ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) .

(2) This section is subject to exemptions from this section established under ORS 815.120 (Exemptions from emblem requirements) .

(3) The offense described in this section, violation of slow-moving vehicle emblem requirements, is a Class C traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §468; 1985 c.393 §17; 2013 c.478 §1]
markdown:
## Title 59
### Chapter 815. Vehicle Equip. Generally
##### § 815.115 — Violation of emblem requirements

(1) A person commits the offense of violation of slow-moving vehicle emblem requirements if the person:

    (a) Drives or moves on any highway or owns and causes or knowingly permits to be driven or moved on any highway a vehicle or combination of vehicles if the vehicle or combination of vehicles:

        (A) Is required by ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) to be equipped with a slow-moving vehicle emblem and the vehicle is not equipped with an emblem in the manner required by ORS 815.060 (Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems) .

        (B) Is displaying a slow-moving vehicle emblem when not required under ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) or in a manner not in conformity with ORS 815.060 (Rules establishing standards for slow-moving vehicle emblems) ; or

    (b) Displays a slow-moving vehicle emblem on a highway when not required under ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) .

(2) This section is subject to exemptions from this section established under ORS 815.120 (Exemptions from emblem requirements) .

(3) The offense described in this section, violation of slow-moving vehicle emblem requirements, is a Class C traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §468; 1985 c.393 §17; 2013 c.478 §1]

subsections.label: A

subsections.label: b
subsections.text: Displays a slow-moving vehicle emblem on a highway when not required under ORS 815.110 (Requirements for and use of slow-moving vehicle emblem) .
This section is subject to exemptions from this section established under ORS 815.120 (Exemptions from emblem requirements) .
The offense described in this section, violation of slow-moving vehicle emblem requirements, is a Class C traffic violation. [1983 c.338 §468; 1985 c.393 §17; 2013 c.478 §1]
